for the possibility of human birth in the pattern of destiny,
that Kunda multiplication method originated. As per ancient
definition, if Lagna longitude is even approximately correct,
ifwe multiply Lagna longitude with 81 resultant longitude
should fall in the Nakshatra of Natal moon or its trine
Nakshatras. Mathematically-
Kunda Longitude = 81 x Lagna longitude
=Longitude of Moon ± 120 deg or 0 deg.
The rhythmic correlation between daily revolution ofe arth
and rotation of Moon around earth inherent in the above
formula is given below-

52 Secrets o( Birth Time Rectification
1 Day= 360 Deg revolution of Earth= 81 x 360 deg
= 81 rotations of the wheel of destiny
That is, the time takenfor one rotation ofthe wheel of
destiny
= 360/81 = 4° -26'-40"
Ifw e accept that birth could take place in trine Nakshatras
as well, then-
The duration between two births= 1°-28- 53.33"
That is the difference between any two such points in the
wheel of destiny- 5 min 55 sec (6 min approx.
